issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling for Chrome MCP failures and build errors, focusing only on the happy path.
Skill assumes Claude Code with Chrome MCP, limiting applicability to other AI agents.

scenarios.name: clone-dashboard-page
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fail to meet the rubric.

scenarios.name: clone-landing-page
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items with detailed steps, while Response B only downloads the page and misses all required tasks.
